user returns SblrExecutionContext.user_uuid without parser-side execution

server_version is a deterministic fixed implementation string for this slice
server_version_num is 0.1.0 packed as major*10000 + minor*100 + patch
literal current_setting('timezone') binds to a nullary fixed UTC policy scalar
current_timezone lowers to the fixed UTC current_setting_timezone policy scalar
bare current_setting surface reaches the generic current_setting runtime for recognized fixed-policy setting names
generic current_setting returns UTC for timezone
unknown current_setting refuses unless missing_ok is true
literal current_setting('var') reaches the generic current_setting runtime and exact-refuses because mutable setting catalogs are not implemented in this slice
literal current_setting('autocommit') exact-refuses and does not claim mutable autocommit session-setting semantics
unknown current_setting returns null when missing_ok is true
